title: cota dalmatica
intro: Cota dalmatica, also known as Dalmatian Cota, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, characterized by its white or pinkish flowers and coarse, hairy leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. Cota dalmatica is believed to offer various health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations, reducing fever, and relieving respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to take advantage of its medicinal and health-promoting properties.
